name: Enchantress
bio:
Nine-Tailed Fox Support of the Demon Faction, once a noble deity from the mysterious East. She became a core figure with her beauty and power, charming minds and supporting allies.

Role: Control Survival
Specialty: A mid-backline Control-type hero that can steal enemy attributes and apply Hallucinogenic Toxin to reduce healing; can also revive allies when they die.

skillSlots.name: Soul Snare
skillSlots.description: Attacks 2 highest-ATK enemies for 220% M.DMG, healing self and lowest-HP ally for 40% of DMG dealt.

skillSlots.name: Deadly Amorous Kiss
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemies for 120% M.DMG, dealing 150% extra M.DMG to highest-ATK enemy with 80% probability to apply [Charm].

effects.name: Soul Domination
effects.description: [Soul Hook] Steals 20 Speed from target (max 20 Speed per enemy, self Speed cap +80) for 2 turns.

effects.name: Soul Domination
effects.description: At turn end, deals 150% ATK as M.DMG to 1 random enemy and heals self + lowest-HP ally for 30% of DMG dealt.

effects.name: Soul Domination
effects.description: Each [Charm]-affected Enemy provides Enchantress with 10% Final DMG (max 30%); each [Charm]-unaffected enemy provides 5% Effect Hit Rate (max 20%).

effects.name: Soul Domination
effects.description: [Charm]-affected enemies deal 100% increased Basic Attack DMG and Crit Rate when attacking allies.

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: [Deadly Amorous Kiss] now applies 2 stack of [Charm].

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: When [Charm]-affected enemies die, heals all allies for 150% ATK and reduces [Deadly Amorous Kiss] cooldown by 1 turn (max 1 trigger per turn).

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: [Deadly Amorous Kiss] additionally deals 150% ATK as M.DMG to another highest-ATK enemy with 80% probability to apply 1 stack of [Charm] .

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: [Soul Domination]'s end-of-turn attack now additionally hits up to 2 [Charm]-affected enemies.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: All Enchantress' attacks have 20% independent probability per hit to apply 1 stack of [Charm].
